3188600.name: The King Feasts First
3188600.description:
Welcome to The King Feasts First - a cozy, whimsical arcade tavern game set in a fairy-tale medieval world. Run your own bustling inn, serve curious guests, and keep your reputation sparkling… all while juggling unexpected twists that turn every day into a new story.

Each day begins with preparation: tidy your tavern, heat up the stove and check who’s likely to walk through the door. Once the doors open, factions of villagers, nobles, and adventurers arrive - each with their own patience, generosity, and appetites. Some days bring events that flip tavern life on its head, from magical golden eggs to wars that rattle the realm.

And beware the royal visits. When the King himself arrives, his feast must come first - neglect him, and your hard-earned reputation could crumble.

Earn gold, unlock ingredients, and expand your menu with fresh recipes. Balance careful preparation with quick reactions, adapt to daily surprises, and keep your tavern thriving in a world where anything can happen.

  • Play with a friend – Even the hardest tasks are easier when you work together.

  • Handle unexpected events – Encounter plenty of magical surprises that sometimes bend the rules.

  • Enhance your surroundings – Upgrade your space with helpful tools, stations, and more.

  • Cook with creativity – Balance ingredients, timing, and flavor to keep even the King satisfied.

  • Keep the tavern clean & safe – Chase off rats, tidy up messes, and make sure your inn stays welcoming.

  • Manage your resources – Ensure everything is stocked, organized, and ready for a busy day.

Welcome, and thank you for taking the time to check out my first game.

I hope it lives up to my own expectations, as well as yours, and that it turns out to be an enjoyable experience.

Feel free to share your thoughts and feedback on anything you find worth noting as development is still ongoing.
3188600.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
